Makefile for building the JerryScript application on the NuttX STM32F4 platform with specific configurations.

# Purpose
The file configures the build process for the JerryScript application within a software project. It sets default values for the priority, stack size, and heap size of the JerryScript application using the variables `CONFIG_JERRYSCRIPT_PRIORITY`, `CONFIG_JERRYSCRIPT_STACKSIZE`, and `CONFIG_JERRYSCRIPT_HEAPSIZE`. The application name is defined as `jerry`, and the root directory is set to the relative path `../../..`. The file specifies compiler flags, including the C99 standard and a macro for the memory heap area size. It also includes paths to the JerryScript core directories for header files. The file defines a target `jerry_core_allin.c` that aggregates all C source files from the JerryScript core into a single file for compilation. The program name is set using the variable `CONFIG_JERRYSCRIPT_PROGNAME`, and the build process includes the `Application.mk` file from the application directory.
